name: Quick-Fix Steak and Lemon-Pepper Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1 1/3 lbs (4 medium) potatoes - cut into 2-inch chunks
1 1/2 tablespoons Butter or margarine - cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish or pan, mix together the prepared Italian dressing and soy sauce.
2. Add the flank steak and turn to coat evenly. Cover and refrigerate for at least 20 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, place the potatoes, butter, lemon juice, and garlic in a shallow 1 1/2- to 2-quart microwave-safe dish. Toss gently.
4. Cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner vented. Microwave on HIGH for 12 to 16 minutes until just tender.
5. Preheat the broiler for 10 minutes.
6. Remove the steak from the marinade and broil for 5 to 10 minutes on each side, or until desired doneness is reached.
7. While the steak is cooking, mix the parsley, lemon peel, and pepper into the cooked potatoes. Season with salt and microwave on HIGH for about 1 minute until hot.
8. Slice the meat diagonally across the grain into thin slices. Serve with the potatoes.
NOTE: Microwave cooking times are based on a 700-watt microwave. Adjust cooking times to your own oven.
Menu: Caesar Salad, Raspberry Frozen Yogurt
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 580 calories; 33 g fat; 140 mg cholesterol; 850 mg sodium; 28 g carbohydrate; 3 g fiber; 44 g protein.
